about.title: About Me
about.backgroundText: I'm a sophomore Data Science student at HCMIU (Ho Chi Minh City International University), Vietnam. I'm passionate about turning data into insights and building intelligent systems.
about.interestAiText: Building and training models for real-world applications
about.interestGameText: Creating interactive experiences and learning game engines
about.interestVizText: Presenting data in clear, meaningful ways
